name: WEST BANCORPORATION INC
summary: West Bancorporation, Inc. is an Iowa-based financial holding company that owns West Bank, a business-focused community bank founded in 1893 and headquartered in West Des Moines, Iowa. West Bank offers commercial, real estate, and consumer loans, trust services, checking/savings/money market accounts, time certificates of deposit, online and mobile banking, treasury management, merchant card processing, and corporate credit cards across central and eastern Iowa and southern Minnesota markets.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Credit products for small- to medium-sized businesses in local markets.

products.name: Real Estate Loans
products.description: Real estate lending products offered to customers in primary market areas.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Consumer credit products offered to individual customers.

products.name: Trust Services
products.description: Administration of estates, conservatorships, personal trusts and agency accounts.

products.name: Commercial and Consumer Deposit Accounts
products.description: Checking, savings, money market accounts and time certificates of deposit.

products.name: Online and Mobile Banking
products.description: Digital banking access for retail and business customers.

products.name: Treasury Management Services
products.description: Online/mobile cash management, ACH transactions, remote deposit capture, lock box, and fraud protection for businesses.

products.name: Merchant Card Processing
products.description: Card payment processing services offered to business customers.

products.name: Corporate Credit Cards
products.description: Credit card products offered to corporate clients.
